journalName: RESEARCH ON LANGUAGE AND SOCIAL INTERACTION
raw_title: The “I have (someone)” method: Involving a hospital coworker in the matter at hand
title_en: The “I have (someone)” method: Involving a hospital coworker in the matter at hand
title_zh: “我有（某人）”方法：让医院同事参与当前事务
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了医院工作人员如何通过说“我有（某人）”来让同事参与处理当前事务。这是一种沟通策略，旨在促进协作和解决问题。
plain_summary_en: This research examines how hospital staff use the phrase 'I have (someone)' to involve coworkers in handling current matters. It's a communication strategy aimed at fostering collaboration and problem-solving.
research_direction_zh: 研究医疗环境中沟通策略如何促进团队协作和效率，关注日常互动中的语言使用。
research_direction_en: Investigating how communication strategies in healthcare settings enhance team collaboration and efficiency, focusing on language use in everyday interactions.
